reviews.text: Place was not clean on arrival — crumbs in the kitchen and hair in the bathroom. Disappointing for the price.
Host was very slow to respond about the broken AC. Took two days to even acknowledge it.
They cancelled my reservation a week before the trip with no real explanation. Scrambled to rebook.
Used to be a Superhost a couple years ago but the standards have really slipped lately.
Great location and lovely view, but cleanliness has gone downhill compared to my last stay.
Check-in was a nightmare — the lockbox code didn't work and I couldn't reach anyone for an hour.
Communication is poor. Messages went unanswered until after I'd already figured it out myself.
Nice loft but you're on your own once you book. No instructions, no responses.
Self check-in instructions arrived late at night, after I'd been waiting outside.
The heating was broken the entire stay and the hot tub was out of order. Cold mountain nights with no fix.
Maintenance issues everywhere — leaky faucet, a door that wouldn't lock, and a broken stove burner.
Beautiful spot, but clearly nobody has kept up with repairs in a while.
Reported the broken heater and never heard back. Had to buy a space heater myself.
Spotless, exactly as described, and the host responded within minutes. Highly recommend.
Great value for Midtown. A little street noise at night but that's NYC for you.
Smooth self check-in and a genuinely clean space. Would book again.
Not as pictured — the photos make it look luxurious but it's tired and dated in person.
Overpriced for what you get. Felt like a rip-off once we saw the actual condition.
The listing description oversells it. Several amenities listed simply weren't there.
Decent pool, but the value just isn't there at this nightly rate.
Filthy on arrival — dishes in the sink and the floors clearly hadn't been mopped. One star.
Broken shower, mold in the bathroom, and the fridge wasn't cooling. Avoid until they fix things.
This place lost its Superhost status for a reason. Cleanliness and upkeep have collapsed.
Host barely communicates and the unit needs serious maintenance. Felt neglected.
Good harbor views can't make up for how dirty and run-down the apartment was.
